## Summary

Brief description of what this PR adds or changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Content correction (white paper, documentation)
- [ ] New documentation or research notes
- [ ] Repository structure improvement
- [ ] Link or path fix
- [ ] Other

## Changes

List the specific files changed and what was done.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked that all links and relative paths are correct
- [ ] Markdown renders correctly in GitHub preview
- [ ] Changes are consistent with the repository structure described in `README.md`
- [ ] Sources are cited where applicable
